effect: At the beginning of your recollection phase, put all cards from your memory on the bottom of your deck in any order, then draw that many cards.

flavor:
"Such a curious thing. It seems as though it's alive."
— Rai Kyouki
name: Arcanist's Prism
effect_html: At the beginning of your recollection phase, put all cards from your memory on the bottom of your deck in any order, then draw that many cards.

effect:
As an additional cost to use this weapon for an attack, pay (2).

[Class Bonus] CARDNAME gets +1 [POWER] for each token you control. *(Apply this effect only if your champion's class matches this card's class.)*
effect_raw:
As an additional cost to use this weapon for an attack, pay (2).

[Class Bonus] Archon Broadsword gets +1 POWER for each token you control. (Apply this effect only if your champion's class matches this card's class.)

effect: [Class Bonus] **On Champion Hit:** The hit champion loses all abilities until the beginning of your next turn. *(Apply this effect only if your champion's class matches this card's class.)*
effect_raw: [Class Bonus] On Champion Hit: The hit champion loses all abilities until the beginning of your next turn. (Apply this effect only if your champion's class matches this card's class.)
flavor: Enchanted by binding magic, this weapon can disable most powers.
name: Caliburn of Silencing

rule.description: Inherited effects and Caliburn of Silencing’s effect add and remove abilities based on timestamps. The timestamp of inherited effects are when the card with that ability entered the lineage. Caliburn of Silencing’s effect is has a timestamp of when its ability resolved. Earlier timestamps apply first.
Only the champion object loses its abilities, the cards in its inner lineage do not.
If a new champion card represents the object, like from leveling up, that new card also loses its abilities. On enter abilities from that card won’t exist to trigger.
On Hit only triggers when 1 or more damage is dealt from the source. If all of the damage was prevented, then On Hit will not trigger.

effect_html: Class Bonus On Champion Hit: The hit champion loses all abilities until the beginning of your next turn. (Apply this effect only if your champion's class matches this card's class.)

effect: [Class Bonus] Your champion gets +1 level for every three **enlighten** counters on them. *(Apply this effect only if your champion's class matches this card's class.)*
effect_raw: [Class Bonus] Your champion gets +1 level for every three enlighten counters on them. (Apply this effect only if your champion's class matches this card's class.)
flavor: In seeing all, he knew all. In knowing all, he ascended.
name: Crystal of Argus
effect_html: Class Bonus Your champion gets +1 level for every three enlighten counters on them. (Apply this effect only if your champion's class matches this card's class.)

effect: **Banish CARDNAME:** Target ally you control gains **true sight** until end of turn. Draw a card. *(Units with **true sight** can attack units with **stealth**.)*
effect_raw: Banish Eye of Argus: Target ally you control gains true sight until end of turn. Draw a card. (Units with true sight can attack units with stealth.)
flavor: A gift from the many-eyed giant. Heroes prize its penetrating gaze.
name: Eye of Argus

rule.description: If the target for the effect becomes invalid during the resolution, the entire effect is negated, including the card draw.

effect_html: Banish Eye of Argus: Target ally you control gains true sight until end of turn. Draw a card. (Units with true sight can attack units with stealth.)

effect: **Banish CARDNAME:** The next Beast ally card you activate this turn costs 3 less to activate. **Class Bonus:** Draw a card. *(Apply the additional effect only if your champion's class matches this card's class.)*
effect_raw: Banish Horn of Beastcalling: The next Beast ally card you activate this turn costs 3 less to activate. Class Bonus: Draw a card. (Apply the additional effect only if your champion's class matches this card's class.)
flavor: Few beasts can resist Gaia's call.
name: Horn of Beastcalling

rule.description: The type of cost decreased is based on the card's default cost type. In most cases, it will decrease reserve cost because it only affects activation costs. However, if a card can be activated from the material deck and has a memory cost as its default cost, the memory cost will decrease by 3.
The cost decrease only affects Beast ally cards that are activated, not materialized.

effect_html: Banish Horn of Beastcalling: The next Beast ally card you activate this turn costs 3 less to activate. Class Bonus: Draw a card. (Apply the additional effect only if your champion's class matches this card's class.)

effect:
[Class Bonus] This card costs 1 less to materialize.

(3), [REST]**:** As a Spell, deal an amount of damage to target unit equal to the amount of **charge** counters on CARDNAME. Then remove a **charge** counter from CARDNAME.

rule.description: 'As a spell' means the effect acts as if it was a Spell subtype, so it can't target units with Spellshroud.

effect: [Class Bonus] **On Enter:** Each player reveals all cards in their memory. If a fire element card was revealed, choose a unit and deal 3 damage to it. If a water element card was revealed, draw a card. If a wind element card was revealed, each opponent banishes a card at random from their memory.
effect_raw: [Class Bonus] On Enter: Each player reveals all cards in their memory. If a fire element card was revealed, choose a unit and deal 3 damage to it. If a water element card was revealed, draw a card. If a wind element card was revealed, each opponent banishes a card at random from their memory.
name: Prismatic Edge

rule.description: For each element, the resulting effect is only performed once regardless of how many of that element is revealed. E.g. If five fire cards were revealed, you only get to deal 3 damage to one unit once.

effect_html: Class Bonus On Enter: Each player reveals all cards in their memory. If a fire element card was revealed, choose a unit and deal 3 damage to it. If a water element card was revealed, draw a card. If a wind element card was revealed, each opponent banishes a card at random from their memory.
